stories.title: Jobs Data Puts Fed In 'Good Spot': TD Securities' Brooks
stories.summary: The Federal Reserve currently finds itself in a 'bit of a goldilocks situation' with softening US labor data easing pressure to urgently hike rates, according to TD Securities US Rates Strategist Molly Brooks. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Gold Extends Gain as Weak US Jobs Data Lowers Rate-Hike Odds
stories.summary: Gold extended two days of gains after weak US jobs data reduced the chances of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates this year to tackle inflation.

stories.title: Chip Industry Urges US to Avoid Moves That Distort Memory Market
stories.summary: Government attempts to address the global memory chip shortage by influencing prices or production capacity would worsen a historic squeeze on supply driven by the artificial intelligence boom, a semiconductor industry group warned the Trump administration.
